title: Edenpunk SMP Modpack
description: This is a modpack created for my personal SMP server, it has a mix of Vanilla+, Tech and Magic mods that are meant to cater for as many playstyles as possible while still running on low-end pcs. It's a mess but also a bunch of fun
body:
Modpack for our SMP survival server. Uploaded to modrinth for ease of updating in the future, as this is the most duct-taped together thing I've ever created.

Has a bunch of tech, magic and exploration mods, with focus on being easy to run while maitaining enough variety for everyone to find their own niche.
